title: Matsyendranāth / Nāth Sādhana
century: Medieval (c. 9th–12th c. — Matsyendranāth); Nāth order from c. 11th–13th c.
description: The Nāth Siddha tradition attributed to Matsyendranāth (c. 9th–10th c.) — the founder of the Kaula-Yoginī lineage that evolved into the Nāth Sampradāya under his disciple Gorakhnāth. Attested in the *Kaulajñānanirṇaya* (attributed to Matsyendranāth himself), the *Matsyendra Saṃhitā*, the *Akulavīra Tantra*, and the *Jñānasaṅkalpa Tantra*. The path of the yogic-astral-body, the Kuṇḍalinī-awakening,
